name: Scottish Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: COUNTRY WOMAN MAGAZINE - JULY/AUGUST 19
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and brown sugar.
2. Add 3-3/4 cups flour; mix well.
3. Sprinkle a board with some of the remaining flour. Knead for 5 minutes, adding enough remaining flour to make a soft, non-sticky dough.
4. Roll to 1/2 inch thickness.
5. Cut into 3" x 1-inch strips.
6. Place 1-inch apart on ungreased baking sheets.
7. Prick with a fork.
8. Bake at 325 degrees for 20-25 minutes, or until cookies are lightly browned. Yield about 4 dozen.
